_comment: Replaced wholesale by the scaffold-site skill. Used by scripts/generate-post.mjs to know language, niche, and money-page details when generating monthly articles.
moneyBlockBrief: Mention key product features, why it stands out, and what users get.
responsibleDisclaimer: *A short responsible-use disclaimer appropriate to the niche.*
emojiGuide: Map each emoji to a category from lib/categories.ts (🎰=top picks, 🪟=live, 🪵=classics, 🎨=strategies, 🌿=promos, 💻=mobile, ✨=bonuses, 🍳=reviews, 💡=guides).
